channel.title: Robust Test Automation with Java
channel.description: A Blog to share Test Automation best practices oriented towards complex scenarios.

item.title: Link Checker With Selenium
item.description: As a Test Automation Engineer, if you’re solely dedicated to writing test cases in Selenium you will not be performing to your true potential. There are many things you could...

item.title: Retry Failed Tests With TestNG
item.description:
Why Retry Automated Tests with Selenium?

Retrying failed automated tests is fundamental in a good Automation Framework. It is so because things rarely go exactly as planned, there are numerous...

item.title: Parallelization with TestNG
item.description:
Why Parallelization?

Parallelization is the notion of executing more than one test at the same time, exponentially decreasing the amount of time needed to run your test suite/s. This can...

item.title: Executing Your First Test
item.description: In our previous post, we staged a way to create Drivers, but we haven’t used it yet. This time we will create some sample tests, a BaseTest.java class, and...

item.title: Effective Locators in Selenium
item.description:
